objective: Implement the two-lane promotion state machine (ADR-0002): Lane A reference ladder with three human-only gates, per-lane requirement thresholds, lane-aware publication and evidence-packet label enforcement, five new agent-ops schemas, and the constitution/doc updates — with Lane B behavior and historical ledger digests preserved byte-for-byte.
current_state: Single linear 13-state physical ladder in promotion.py (schema 1.0.0, rank+1 promotion, hash-chained JSONL); review.py publication gate and check-evidence-packet.py lint are physical-lane only; no reference bundle schemas exist. Design fixed by docs/agent-ops/adr-0002-two-lane-reference-synthesis.md.
acceptance_criteria: Entire pre-existing test suite passes unchanged; no existing test is edited to accommodate behavior changes (additive test edits only).
A recorded schema-1.0.0 physical ledger fixture replays with byte-identical event digests.

Lane A ladder enforces: entry at hypothesis only; exact-variant-verified, adversarial-review-passed, production-reference-derived are human-only with named technical_reviewer; rights_reviewer additionally required at production-reference-derived.

Lane A thresholds enforced: reference_bundle_id from exact-variant-verified; input_hashes from public-reference-supported; source_quality_tier (A, or B only with human review), evidence_packet, and resolved rights_status from reference-assets-proposed; metrics from reference-profile-fitted.
Lane is immutable per revision; cross-lane demotion impossible; validate_reference_family_proposal requires >=2 distinct card_ids and >=2 distinct bundle_ids at >= adversarial-review-passed.

A reference-lane profile or evidence packet containing 'capture-validated', 'physically measured', or 'physically exact' is rejected by the publication gate and flagged by the lint; allowed labels reference-derived / source-supported simulation / visually fitted across real-card references pass.
Five new schemas validate their synthetic fixtures; evidence-packet schema gains an optional lane field without breaking the existing prep packet.
AGENTS.md, approval-state-machine.md, README.md, concurrency-policy.md, ownership.json updated per ADR-0002.
required_tests: uv run pytest tests/test_promotion.py tests/test_promotion_cli.py tests/test_review.py tests/test_agent_gates.py
uv run ruff check src tests
stop_conditions: Any pre-existing test would need behavioral modification to pass.
Historical ledger digest replay breaks under the new event model.
The design requires editing files outside allowed_paths.
Lane B semantics would change in any observable way.
expected_outputs: Five new agent-ops schemas with fixtures
Updated AGENTS.md, approval-state-machine.md, ownership.json, concurrency-policy.md, agent-ops README, pyproject.toml console scripts
